pure_functions.raw_ts_expression: this.stops.find((stop: { stop_code: string, stop_lat: number, stop_lon: number }) => stop.stop_code === stopCode)

rules.description: Filter out train updates that only have one change and that change is of type OTHER (not relevant to trip progress)
Filter out train updates for stations that are not relevant (not in stopInfo or not in R9K relevant stations)

Determine movement type based on change type: ARRIVAL for ReachedFinalDestination or ArrivedAtStation, DEPARTURE for ExitedFirstStation/ExitedStation/PassedStationWithoutStopping, PREDICTION for ScheduleChange, OTHER otherwise

raw_condition.ts: switch (+changeType) { case ChangeType.ReachedFinalDestination: case ChangeType.ArrivedAtStation: return MovementType.ARRIVAL; case ChangeType.ExitedFirstStation: case ChangeType.ExitedStation: case ChangeType.PassedStationWithoutStopping: return MovementType.DEPARTURE; case ChangeType.ScheduleChange: return MovementType.PREDICTION; } return MovementType.OTHER;

rules.description: Use departure location overwrite if movement type is not ARRIVAL and overwrite location exists for the station
Filter relevant stations based on configured filter stations matching stop code in STATION_ID_TO_STOP_CODE_MAP

details.condition: Filter out single-change updates with MovementType.OTHER
Use overwrite location if movement type is not ARRIVAL and overwrite exists

details.mapping: For each allocated vehicle, create SmarTrakEvent with location and timestamp

context.purpose: Converts R9K train position updates from KiwiRail track sensors into SmarTrak location events by enriching with GTFS stop data and block management vehicle allocations, then publishing to Kafka for downstream consumption

domain_rules.rule: Only process train updates that indicate trip progress (filter out MovementType.OTHER when only one change)
Only process updates for configured relevant stations (filterStations)
Use departure location overwrite for non-arrival movements at specific stations (133, 134, 9218)
Map station IDs to GTFS stop codes using STATION_ID_TO_STOP_CODE_MAP
Remove spaces from vehicle label when creating external ID
Set GPS accuracy and speed to 0 for station-based location events

io_operations.raw_call: this.stops.find((stop: { stop_code: string, stop_lat: number, stop_lon: number }) => stop.stop_code === stopCode)

async_patterns.pattern: retry with exponential backoff for HTTP requests (UtilsCommon.retry)
await multiple async operations: getVehiclesByExternalRefId then map over results

error_flow.from: HTTP request failure (status >= 500 or network error)

error_flow.to: log error and return empty array
